response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong software craftsmanship fundamentals and has assembled a polyglot toolkit spanning multiple platforms. However, he fails to meet critical minimum qualifications: he has approximately 6 months of C++ experience (vs. 8-year requirement) and roughly 2 years of large-scale distributed systems work at Dunnhumby (vs. 5-year minimum). His career trajectory is rooted in full-stack web and mobile development rather than cloud infrastructure and systems engineering. While he has some infrastructure exposure through AWS CDK, Kubernetes, and CI/CD work, the depth and focus required for a mid-senior cloud platform technical leader are not evident.
strengths: Strong software engineering fundamentals with demonstrated commitment to TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and code quality practices
Polyglot programmer with exposure to multiple languages and platforms, showing adaptability and breadth of technical knowledge
Active mentor and community builder evidenced by workshops, conference talks, open source projects (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts, Trial)
concerns: Critical C++ experience gap: only 6 months at National Instruments (2014-2015) vs. 8-year minimum requirement
Insufficient large-scale distributed systems depth: ~2 years at Dunnhumby vs. 5-year minimum for infrastructure and systems work
Career path focused on full-stack web/mobile development rather than cloud infrastructure; lacks demonstrated production cloud architecture or DevOps technical leadership experience

key_factors.factor: Large-scale infrastructure and distributed systems experience
Cloud platform technical leadership track record
